flavour_text: The first harvest looked modest at dawn. By midday the bins were fuller than any careful count had promised, and by evening the streets carried the scent of bread, broth, and relief. Each shared basket made the settlement feel less temporary.
season_i: Farm Production this round: gain +1 Food each time.
season_ii: First 2 Farm Productions this round: gain +1 Food and +1 Goods each time.
season_iii: Farm Production this round: gain +2 resources each time; choose Food or Goods.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: After weeks of patient strikes, the stone gave way. The miners returned grey with dust and pride, bearing news of a passage veined with promise. In the ledger I marked the day the old depths exhaled, and the settlement listened.
season_i: Mine Production this round: gain +1 Stone each time.
season_ii: First 2 Mine Productions this round: gain +1 Stone and +1 Metal each time.
season_iii: Mine Production this round: gain +2 resources each time; choose Stone or Metal.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: The foresters took only what the woodland could spare. Under bramble and leaf mould, old paths began to show themselves again: game trails, hidden groves, and turns once thought lost. Each discovery suggested the forest might recover its rhythm beside us.
season_i: Forest Production this round: gain +1 Wood each time.
season_ii: First 2 Forest Productions this round: gain +2 Wood each time.
season_iii: Forest Production this round: gain +2 resources each time; choose Wood or Food.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Rain held the Vale quiet for a day and a night. When the clouds cleared, moss had thickened, herbs had risen, and wounded soil answered with green abundance. Water that once barred the way had, for once, become provision.
season_i: Wildlands Production this round: gain +1 Herbs each time.
season_ii: First 2 Wildlands Productions this round: gain +2 Herbs each time.
season_iii: Wildlands Production this round: gain +2 resources each time; choose Herbs or Food.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Lanterns lined the road while goods changed hands under careful eyes. There was laughter, but not carelessness; bargaining, but not greed. Small wonders passed from stall to stall, and by dusk the market felt like a promise the settlement could keep.
season_i: Next Merchant Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost by 1 resource of your choice.
season_ii: Next Merchant Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost by 2 resources total.
season_iii: One Merchant Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost to 0. It still costs its normal Action.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Beneath the fallen vaults we uncovered hide-bound pages, star charts, and intricate tools. Damp had marked them, but not claimed them. What endured there now guides harvest and craft, a quiet proof that patience can preserve more than stone.
season_i: Next Dig Site Production this round: gain +1 Metal.
season_ii: Next Dig Site Production this round: gain +1 Metal and +1 Goods.
season_iii: Dig Site Production this round: gain +2 resources each time; choose Metal or Goods.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Tools, cloth, carvings, and cookfires filled the square. The fair was louder in spirit than in sound. Pride in honest work passed from hand to hand, and knowledge moved almost unnoticed between neighbours who had come only to look.
season_i: Next Crafting Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost by 1 resource of your choice.
season_ii: Next Crafting Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost by 2 resources total.
season_iii: One Crafting Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost to 0. It still costs its normal Action.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: For the first time in years, the settlement was quiet enough to study the night sky. Lanterns burned beside maps and ledgers while patient eyes followed the stars. By morning, our plans felt less like guesses and more like care.
season_i: Look at the top 3 cards of the Encounter Deck. Return them in the same order.
season_ii: Look at the top 4 cards of the Encounter Deck. Return them in any order.
season_iii: Look at the top 6 cards of the Encounter Deck. Return them in any order.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: The apprentice asked more questions than I had answers for. Three ledgers, two errands, and a day of close observation later, their sharp eyes had found gaps I had missed. Eager hands can widen the settlement’s reach without fanfare.
season_i: Next Resource Tile placed this round: spend 0 Actions to place it. Pay costs and follow placement rules.
season_ii: Next Resource or Housing Tile placed this round: spend 0 Actions to place it. Pay costs and follow placement rules.
season_iii: Next tile placed this round: spend 0 Actions to place it. Pay costs and follow placement rules.

layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Fewer quarrels reached the board this week. Shared meals, mended fences, and small courtesies did more than any order could have done. Trust returned by degrees, carried in bowls of stew and quiet apologies.
season_i: Next Housing Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost by 1 resource of your choice.
season_ii: Next Housing Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost by 2 resources total.
season_iii: One Housing Tile placed or upgraded this round: reduce its resource cost to 0. It still costs its normal Action.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: At first there was one traveller, then wagons, then families. Roads once emptied by fear began to carry voices again. Each arrival tied the settlement a little closer to the world beyond its lanterns.
season_i: Next Travel Tile placed this round: spend 0 Actions to place it. Pay costs and follow placement rules.
season_ii: Next Travel Tile placed or upgraded this round: spend 0 Actions to place or upgrade it. Pay costs and follow normal rules.
season_iii: Next 2 Travel Tiles placed or upgraded this round: each costs 0 Actions. Pay costs and follow normal rules.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: We set aside what could be spared and sent it where hardship had taken root. Each parcel was small, yet the effect was not. Generosity, carefully tended, multiplied faster than the stores diminished.
season_i: You may pay 3 Goods to remove 1 Strain from 1 placed tile.
season_ii: You may pay 4 Goods to remove up to 2 Strain from 1 placed tile.
season_iii: You may pay 5 Goods to remove up to 3 Strain from up to 2 placed tiles.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Herbal smoke curled above the roofs long after sunset. Careful hands prepared tonics, poultices, and warm cups for those who needed them. By morning the sickrooms were quieter, and the settlement’s strength had been preserved without ceremony.
season_i: You may pay 4 Herbs to remove 1 Strain from 1 placed tile.
season_ii: You may pay 5 Herbs to remove up to 2 Strain from 1 placed tile.
season_iii: You may pay 6 Herbs to remove up to 3 Strain from up to 2 placed tiles.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Lanterns were hung along roads and crossings until the dark no longer felt like a closed gate. Fewer feet slipped, fewer travellers lost heart, and confidence returned in small pools of light.
season_i: You may pay 4 Metal to remove 1 Strain from 1 placed tile.
season_ii: You may pay 5 Metal to remove up to 2 Strain from 1 Travel or Housing Tile.
season_iii: You may pay 6 Metal to remove up to 3 Strain from up to 2 Travel or Housing Tiles.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: While clearing soft earth for new walls, we found footings older than any living witness. The stone still held. Work laid down generations before us now bears our weight, and asks only that we build with equal care.
season_i: Next Housing Tile placed this round: reduce its Wood and/or Stone cost by 2 total.
season_ii: Next Housing Tile placed this round: reduce its Wood and/or Stone cost by 4 total.
season_iii: Next Housing Tile placed this round: reduce its resource cost to 0. It still costs its normal Action.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Stones moved today that would have broken a single back. Beams rose, meals were passed along, and each task became lighter as hands joined it. Cooperation lifted more than timber.
season_i: Next tile placed this round: reduce its resource cost by 1 resource of your choice.
season_ii: Next 2 tiles placed this round: each reduces its resource cost by 1 resource of your choice.
season_iii: Next 2 tiles placed or upgraded this round: each reduces its resource cost by 2 resources total.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: The clouds parted after sunset, and lamps burned late over maps and ledgers. In the quiet, choices that had seemed tangled became plain. A clear night can give momentum before a single tool is lifted.
season_i: Look at the top 2 cards of the Encounter Deck. Return them in any order.
season_ii: Look at the top 3 cards of the Encounter Deck. Return them in any order.
season_iii: Look at the top 4 cards of the Encounter Deck. Return them in any order. Then you may move the bottom card of that group to the top.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: A gate held open for one extra moment can change a welcome. This week patience did what speed could not: it made room for the hesitant, the weary, and the nearly turned away.
season_i: Add 1 timer token to 1 active Arrival. No Arrival may exceed 3 timer tokens.
season_ii: Add up to 2 timer tokens among active Arrivals. No Arrival may exceed 3 timer tokens.
season_iii: Add up to 3 timer tokens among active Arrivals. No Arrival may exceed 3 timer tokens.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: We divided the burden before it could divide us. Every small effort left a mark: a lifted beam, a carried pail, a repaired hinge. Shared work steadied the settlement more surely than any single grand gesture.
season_i: Next active Burden resolved: reduce its resource cost by 2 resources of your choice.
season_ii: Next active Burden resolved: reduce its resource cost by 4 resources of your choice.
season_iii: Next active Burden resolved: reduce its resource cost by 6 resources of your choice.

layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: After the storm, I inspected the shelters and found the old repairs still holding. Beams strained but did not fail; walls shuddered but stayed true. Care given early had kept fear from becoming loss.
season_i: Remove 1 Strain from 1 Supported tile.
season_ii: Remove 1 Strain from up to 2 Supported tiles.
season_iii: Remove 1 Strain from up to 3 Supported tiles.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: Help remained where others might have moved on. By evening, the damage there had begun to resemble a place of repair rather than a place of loss. Steady presence can alter the shape of trouble.
season_i: Each tile with one or more Steward Tokens: remove 1 Strain. If it had no Strain, gain 1 resource of your choice instead, max 2 total.
season_ii: Each tile with one or more Steward Tokens: remove 1 Strain. If it had no Strain, gain 2 resources of your choice instead, max 4 total.
season_iii: Each tile with one or more Steward Tokens: remove 1 Strain. If it had no Strain, gain 3 resources of your choice instead, max 6 total.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.

flavour_text: The stores were not plentiful, but they were dry, counted, and well organised. Each provision had a place, and each place had a record. Order prevented the first edge of crisis from finding purchase.
season_i: Exchange up to 2 Warehouse resources for the same number of resources of any type.
season_ii: Exchange up to 4 Warehouse resources for the same number of resources of any type.
season_iii: Exchange up to 6 Warehouse resources for the same number of resources of any type.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Resolve the current Season effect, then discard this card.

flavour_text: The report of swift progress sounded unlikely until the work itself confirmed it. Fair weather, clear purpose, and enough willing hands had achieved what no single planner would have promised.
season_i: Next Core Tile upgraded: reduce its upgrade resource cost by 1 resource of your choice.
season_ii: Next Core Tile upgraded: reduce its upgrade resource cost by 2 resources of your choice.
season_iii: Next Core Tile upgraded: reduce its upgrade resource cost by 3 resources of your choice.

flavour_text: Doors opened, and the arrivals answered with care of their own. A phrase repeated at the threshold, a gesture offered without demand, a cup placed before a question: these became customs before anyone named them.
season_i: Next Arrival completed: reduce its resource Requirement by 1 resource of your choice.
season_ii: Next Arrival completed: reduce its resource Requirement by 2 resources of your choice.
season_iii: Next Arrival completed: reduce its resource Requirement by 3 resources of your choice.

layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: The Vale bends under strain, but it has not broken. Pressure revealed weak places, yet also the hands ready to mend them. Resilience showed itself quietly, in repairs made before despair could settle.
season_i: Remove up to 2 Strain from 1 Overstrained tile. If you removed no Strain this way, remove 1 Strain from 1 placed tile instead.
season_ii: Remove up to 2 Strain from 1 Overstrained tile. If you removed no Strain this way, remove 1 Strain from up to 2 placed tiles instead.
season_iii: Remove up to 2 Strain from each of up to 2 Overstrained tiles. If you removed no Strain this way, remove 1 Strain from up to 3 placed tiles instead.

layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three stacked Season rows with left I/II/III markers. Move repeated lifecycle text to footer.

flavour_text: I marked the first spoiled field at dawn and the second before noon. Farmers say the soil was driven too hard in the years of war. Now it answers every seed with a little less mercy.
season_i: Choose 1 Farm with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Farm with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 Farm with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent placed tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: Whole groves vanished to feed the engines of war, and the forest has not forgotten. Healthy branches fall without warning, paths close behind walkers, and woodcutters return early with the look of people overheard by trees.
season_i: Choose 1 Forest with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Forest with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 Forest with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent placed tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: The miners heard something deep within the seam: not collapse, not water, not stone. Whatever fled beneath the earth during the war may still be wounded. Wounded things do not always recognise kindness.
season_i: Choose 1 Mine with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Mine with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 Mine with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent Travel or Resource Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: When the armies retreated, they left beasts too frightened to command. We found fences burst outward and tracks driven deep through the mud. With time they may settle, but today they remember only flight.
season_i: Choose 1 Wildlands with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Wildlands with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 Wildlands with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent Housing or Travel Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: The vault opened cleanly, but damp had worked there for centuries. Pages clung together like old wounds, and ink bled where hope had been stored. Care may save some of it; haste will ruin the rest.
season_i: Choose 1 Dig Site with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Dig Site with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 Dig Site with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent placed tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: The workshops burned day and night, filling nearby homes with sound and smoke. Children coughed behind shuttered windows while neighbours tried to keep out the very labour meant to sustain them.
season_i: Choose 1 Housing Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is adjacent to a Crafting Tile. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Crafting Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.

flavour_text: Merchants still trade from the old war stores: dented shields, boiled leather, hole-ridden breastplates, and blades worn too thin by use. After each bargain, silence lingers over the table.
season_i: Choose 1 Housing Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is adjacent to a Merchant Tile. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Merchant Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Choose 3 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Merchant Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.

flavour_text: The gathering halls remain full, but the air within them has grown stale. Crowded benches and shared cups have carried sickness through the Vale. What began as one cough now follows warmth and fellowship alike.
season_i: Choose 1 Housing Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is adjacent to a Social Tile. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Social Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Choose 3 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Social Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.

flavour_text: The markets have grown faster than the workshops can sustain. Good hands set down precious tools to argue over time, price, and fairness. Even after compromise, resentment remains on the bench.
season_i: Choose 1 Merchant Tile or Crafting Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is adjacent to the other category. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Merchant Tile and 1 Crafting Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to at least one tile of the other category. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.

flavour_text: No one ordered the ditches dug that way, yet the old shapes returned to the earth. Roads meant to connect us began tracing defensive lines, and the settlement remembered tactics we had tried to bury.
season_i: Choose 1 Travel Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is adjacent to a Resource Tile. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Travel Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Resource Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.

flavour_text: The signs were nothing at first: cracked paving, a twisted tree, a rumour carried from a tired doorstep. By dusk, every weary household had given them meaning, and the route lay empty.
season_i: Choose 1 Travel Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is adjacent to a Housing Tile with 1 or more Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Travel Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are each adjacent to a Housing Tile with 1 or more Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.

flavour_text: The houses keep out wind and rain, but little else. Bare timber, cold rooms, and empty shelves make shelter feel unfinished. Settlement comes slowly when homes still look temporary.
season_i: Choose 1 Housing Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Pay 1 Goods or place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. For each chosen tile, pay 1 Goods or place 1 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 3 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. For each chosen tile, pay 1 Goods or place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: These halls were built for warmth, music, and shared meals. Now bowls are half-filled, ale is watered, and singers leave early. Fellowship is harder to maintain when the shelves can no longer support generosity.
season_i: Choose 1 Social Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Pay 1 Goods or place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Social Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. For each chosen tile, pay 1 Goods or place 1 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 3 Social Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. For each chosen tile, pay 1 Goods or place 1 Strain on it.

flavour_text: The roads stretch faster than we can tend them. A path laid for welcome now sits beyond easy care, its ruts filling with mud and its lanterns unlit. A late traveller arrived tonight already doubting the road.
season_i: Choose 1 Travel Tile with fewer than 3 Strain that is not adjacent to any Housing Tile. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Travel Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are not adjacent to any Housing Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Choose 3 Travel Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain that are not adjacent to any Housing Tile. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Wood; Season II 4 Wood; Season III 6 Wood. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: New houses rise quickly, but walls alone are not enough. I counted roofs fit for shelter, yet too few warm meals, blankets, and outstretched hands to make those roofs feel like home.
season_i: Choose 1 Housing Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Pay 1 Food or 1 Goods, or place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. For each chosen tile, pay 1 Food or 1 Goods, or place 1 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 3 Housing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. For each chosen tile, pay 1 Food or 1 Goods, or place 1 Strain on it.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Food and/or Goods; Season II 4 Food and/or Goods; Season III 6 Food and/or Goods. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Ledgers that once seemed clear no longer agree. Barrels are marked twice, crates move without notation, and every keeper swears their count is true. Numbers can quarrel like neighbours.
season_i: Choose Wood, Stone, or Food. If the Warehouse has at least 2 of that resource, lose 2 of it. Otherwise, choose 1 Resource Tile with fewer than 3 Strain and place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose Wood, Stone, Metal, Food, or Herbs. If the Warehouse has at least 3 of that resource, lose 3 of it. Otherwise, choose 1 Resource Tile with fewer than 3 Strain and place 1 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose any non-Goods resource. If the Warehouse has at least 5 of that resource, lose 5 of it. Otherwise, choose 2 Resource Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain and place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Word travels faster than preparation. The settlement’s welcome is now spoken of beyond the hills, but open doors require more than roofs and food. Every promise made must still be carried.
season_i: Choose 1 active Arrival, if any. Pay 1 Goods or remove 1 timer token from it. If there are no active Arrivals, this Burden has no effect.
season_ii: Choose up to 2 active Arrivals, choosing as many as possible. For each chosen Arrival, pay 1 Goods or remove 1 timer token from it. If there are no active Arrivals, this Burden has no effect.
season_iii: Choose up to 3 active Arrivals, choosing as many as possible. For each chosen Arrival, pay 1 Goods or remove 1 timer token from it. If there are no active Arrivals, this Burden has no effect.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Peace does not close every hurt. A song, a sigil, a name spoken too lightly can uncover wounds only just beginning to heal. Afterwards, silence does the damage words began.
season_i: Choose 1 Social Tile or Wellbeing Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Pay 2 Herbs or place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 Social Tiles and/or Wellbeing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. Pay 4 Herbs total or place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Choose 3 Social Tiles and/or Wellbeing Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. Pay 6 Herbs total or place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Herbs; Season II 4 Herbs; Season III 6 Herbs. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: The shelves are full in one corner and bare in another, which may be worse than general scarcity. People see waste beside want, and frustration grows in the space between them.
season_i: Identify the resource type with the most markers in the Warehouse. If tied, players choose one tied type. Lose as much as possible of that resource, up to 2. If none is lost this way, choose 1 placed tile with fewer than 3 Strain and place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Identify the resource type with the most markers in the Warehouse. If tied, players choose one tied type. Lose as much as possible of that resource, up to 4. If none is lost this way, choose 2 placed tiles with fewer than 3 Strain and place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Identify the resource type with the most markers in the Warehouse. If tied, players choose one tied type. Lose as much as possible of that resource, up to 6. If none is lost this way, choose 3 placed tiles with fewer than 3 Strain and place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Goods; Season II 4 Goods; Season III 6 Goods. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Beneath the new walls, the mason found old iron set for a harder purpose than housing. Rust had split the footing, and with it the confidence that peaceful homes could stand there.
season_i: Choose 1 upgraded Core Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 upgraded Core Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent placed tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 upgraded Core Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 2 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent placed tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Stone; Season II 4 Stone; Season III 6 Stone. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Not every welcome is easily given. The past is not so simple to extinguish, and old loyalties can flare from a single careless name. Some embers remain dangerous long after the fire is gone.
season_i: Choose 1 tile with Renown and fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 2 tiles with Renown and fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Choose 3 tiles with Renown and fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Goods; Season II 4 Goods; Season III 6 Goods. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Kind words fade when action can no longer follow. Provisions are scarce, and hands now pause at once-welcoming doors. Shame gathers on both sides of the threshold.
season_i: Choose 1 active Arrival, if any. Pay 1 Herbs or remove 1 timer token from it. If there are no active Arrivals, this Burden has no effect.
season_ii: Choose up to 2 active Arrivals, choosing as many as possible. For each chosen Arrival, pay 1 Herbs or remove 1 timer token from it. If there are no active Arrivals, this Burden has no effect.
season_iii: Choose up to 3 active Arrivals, choosing as many as possible. For each chosen Arrival, pay 1 Herbs or remove 1 timer token from it. If there are no active Arrivals, this Burden has no effect.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Herbs; Season II 4 Herbs; Season III 6 Herbs. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: Those who guide the settlement carry its weight first, and not always well. Three decisions signed before breakfast had disappointed two households by noon. By nightfall, all of them still felt necessary.
season_i: Choose each tile occupied by one or more Steward Tokens with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_ii: Choose each tile occupied by one or more Steward Tokens with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile.
season_iii: Choose each tile occupied by one or more Steward Tokens with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile. Then choose 1 Steward House with fewer than 3 Strain, if any. Place 1 Strain on it.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Goods; Season II 4 Goods; Season III 6 Goods. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: A tool unused becomes another thing to mend. Good blades dull orange, handles split, and hinges stiffen with neglect. Waste is quieter than theft, but it robs the settlement all the same.
season_i: Choose 1 Crafting Tile or Merchant Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 Crafting Tile or Merchant Tile with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it. Then lose 1 Metal if able.
season_iii: Choose 2 Crafting Tiles and/or Merchant Tiles with fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile. Then lose 1 Metal if able.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Metal; Season II 4 Metal; Season III 6 Metal. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: The Vale rarely announces that it is breaking. It shows itself in the missed greeting, the empty market, the kindness withheld. Small fractures need tending before they learn to widen.
season_i: Choose 1 tile with 1 or more Strain and fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_ii: Choose 1 tile with 1 or more Strain and fewer than 3 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it. Then choose 1 adjacent placed tile with 0 Strain. Place 1 Strain on it.
season_iii: Choose 1 Overstrained tile. Then choose 2 placed tiles with 0 Strain adjacent to it. Place 1 Strain on each chosen tile. If there are no Overstrained tiles, apply the Season II effect instead.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Place this card on the Stewards Board as an active Burden. To resolve: Spend 1 Action and pay resources based on the current Season: Season I 2 Herbs; Season II 4 Herbs; Season III 6 Herbs. Then discard this card.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Three larger Season blocks with left I/II/III markers. Put short To resolve text in relevant block when applicable.

flavour_text: They rode in slowly, cloaks heavy with rain and years alike. Their horses were older, but immaculately kept. I marked their arrival with a note: find pasture, fresh water, and a reason for these riders to stay.
requirement: 2 Wood, 4 Herbs, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tiles on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the last unlocked Special Tile on it is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: A river vessel arrived patched with timber from forgotten ports and ruined warships. Once ashore, its crew unloaded strange cargo and studied the banks with practised eyes. They spoke not of raids, but of trade, crossings, and quieter journeys.
requirement: 2 Wood, 4 Herbs, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They arrived in painted wagons, asking for a place where old names could be spoken without glorifying the wars that took them. By dusk, wood, ribbons, and young hands had gathered. Remembrance began before anyone dared call it theatre.
requirement: 4 Wood and 4 Metal within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: A caravan arrived with unusual cargo: half-finished prosthetics carved from polished wood and hinged with brass. Once battlefield surgeons and armourers, they offered advice worth recording. The Vale must be built for every body that comes to it.
requirement: 4 Wood and 4 Metal within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The teachers brought slates, timber rules, worn books, and minds sharper than any blade. I marked their arrival as the day careful learning became available to all who now call the Quiet Vale home.
requirement: 2 Goods and 2 Herbs within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: Canvas awnings became walls, wagons became kitchens, and by nightfall lantern light spilled across the shelter. Those who ran it turned none away: orphan, labourer, refugee, or wanderer. By morning, the settlement had grown a fuller heart.
requirement: 2 Goods and 2 Herbs within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The brewer claimed a settlement without laughter ferments only bitterness. I considered striking the remark from the record, then heard the yard erupt in song. By nightfall, even our most reserved settlers had given the tale a second verse.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Metal and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: A broad workbench arrived first, crowded with glass vessels that bubbled softly through the night. Their owner promised no miracles, only changes carefully persuaded from stubborn things. I recorded the work with caution; the impossible had become merely expensive.
requirement: 2 Herbs and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: Old armour was surrendered piece by piece: helms for lantern casings, blades for ploughshares, buckles for harness. The veterans overseeing the work said little. The damage on the metal had already spoken enough.
requirement: 2 Metal and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The caretakers buried offerings beneath the first seeds and left a share of every harvest for wandering spirits and hungry birds. Whether by blessing, patience, or simply better care, their fields rarely failed.
requirement: 2 Food and 4 Stone within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The adventurers were nothing like tavern stories. Their armour was mismatched, functional, and often repaired. Their first question was which roads ended in unanswered questions. I recorded them as a small company of useful trouble.
requirement: 4 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The messenger arrived ahead of the wagons, carrying names, rumours, warnings, and hope in equal measure. They believed knowledge might be the first true bridge rebuilt. I copied the news they brought with particular care.
requirement: 2 Food and 4 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They came with seeds wrapped in green thread and bark carvings reminiscent of relics. Their soft words seemed to sink into roots older than any kingdom. Where they walked, the wildlands grew calmer.
requirement: 2 Herbs, 2 Stone, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The miners arrived with faces marked by dust, sweat, and the scrape of stone. They spoke of the deep earth with reverence rather than greed. Their advice was simple: disasters begin when folk stop listening to the mountain.
requirement: 2 Food, 2 Stone, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The smallest hands brought acorns; the oldest brought names of groves burned before those children were born. I wrote them together in the ledger. Renewal begins when memory is entrusted to those who will outlive us.
requirement: 2 Herbs, 2 Stone, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: Beneath the broken stones, the old world still sleeps. Its intricate tools remember hands that once cultivated knowledge with great care. Not all that came before us was lost; some of it was waiting to be found.
requirement: 2 Stone, 2 Metal, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The beast-handler had once kept war mounts and worse. Now his evenings are spent tending lame oxen and brushing ageing draft horses. I recorded the need for pasture and fences, then added one word: changed.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Metal, and 2 Food within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They laid their axes on the table before speaking, sharp edges wrapped in cloth. Once, such tools broke doors and threatened homes. Now their owners asked where beams were needed. The first useful swing sounded different.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Metal, and 2 Food within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: Their marching songs reached us before they did, though the words had changed. Underground, they said, a steady voice can soothe the mountain and steady the hand. I recorded the saying, then heard the tunnels answer.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Metal, and 2 Food within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They asked for herb beds, drying racks, clean water, and clear instruction. Whether preparing tinctures or trimming roots, their discipline was unmistakable. Peace had not softened their hands; it had given them gentler work.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Metal, and 2 Food within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The lorekeepers carried rescued pages in oilcloth, each bundle treated like a patient not yet safe. They asked for shelves, glass lamps, and dryness above all. Their urgency proved well founded.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Stone, and 2 Food within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They arrived in a crowded wagon: strong backs, calloused hands, and a need to be useful. They asked for modest meals, safe shelter, and work that builds rather than breaks. By dusk, walls were rising twice as fast.
requirement: 2 Food, 2 Stone, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They came at dusk with oil, mirrors, hooks, and a stubborn belief that roads should not surrender after sunset. I saw the first lamp lit beyond the nearest homes, then the second, then the third fading into distance.
requirement: 2 Wood, 2 Metal, and 2 Goods within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: They arrived carrying seeds, recipes, and iron cooking pots blackened by years of use. They promised no miracles, only that hardship need not be faced alone. Community makes strong roots; strong roots make resilience.
requirement: 4 Herbs, 4 Food within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: The burden-bearers of the last years asked for a space where grief and exhaustion could be set down. I recorded the request exactly. Even the naming of it seemed to steady the room.
requirement: Have at least 1 Housing Tile and pay 2 Herbs, 2 Stone and 2 Metal within three rounds. Place three tokens on this card to track.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Complete by spending 1 Action while the Requirement is fulfilled. Remove timer tokens and place the unlocked Special Tile on this card. This becomes a Completed Arrival. Discard this card after the unlocked Special Tile is placed.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Type bar + title band. Full flavour text on parchment slip. Rules panel has Requirement and Reward only; do not add separate Timer field.

flavour_text: We found the bell beneath root and rubble, warm beneath the hand despite its long burial. When it rang across the Vale, even abandoned roads seemed to listen. Days later, strangers arrived by ways we thought forgotten.
effect: When revealed, choose 3 unused Arrival Cards from the game box. Shuffle them, reveal 1 at random, and place it on the Stewards Board as an active Arrival with 3 timer tokens. Return the other 2 chosen Arrival Cards to the box. Then discard this card.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Golden Boons are distinct Encounter Cards. They do not use Season fields and may break normal rules only as specified by their Effect text. Specific note: Introduces an unused Arrival from outside the current Encounter pool.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Same back as Encounter deck. More ornate front within shared family. Use one bespoke Effect block; no Season rows.

flavour_text: The traveller appeared after dusk, dry-cloaked despite the rain, and asked only for a place by the fire. Through the night, a melody moved through the sleeping settlement. By morning, the season’s weariness had loosened its grip.
effect: When revealed, after the normal Player Turns phase this round, resolve 1 additional Player Turns phase before Phase Four. Do not seed or reveal Encounter Cards, remove Arrival timers, resolve end-of-round effects, or advance the Round Timer during this additional phase. Each player takes 1 additional turn with the normal action allowance. Then discard this card.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Golden Boons are distinct Encounter Cards. They do not use Season fields and may break normal rules only as specified by their Effect text. Specific note: Council Variant handling flagged for later alignment.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Same back as Encounter deck. More ornate front within shared family. Use one bespoke Effect block; no Season rows.

flavour_text: The ring came from a collapsed cairn beneath the mines, its gold untouched by age. When raised, it seemed to remind roads, walls, and foundations of older orders. For a moment, the settlement obeyed memory.
effect: When revealed, choose up to 5 placed tiles. Remove those tiles, then place each chosen tile into a legal empty map space. Chosen tiles may use spaces vacated by other chosen tiles. Ignore adjacency and reachability restrictions, but all terrain restrictions still apply. Multi-hex tiles must cover only empty, legal hexes. Chosen tiles keep Strain, Supported, upgrade state, and all tokens. Recalculate connectivity and Overstrained effects immediately. Then discard this card.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Golden Boons are distinct Encounter Cards. They do not use Season fields and may break normal rules only as specified by their Effect text. Specific note: Large board-state exception; wording intentionally explicit.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Same back as Encounter deck. More ornate front within shared family. Use one bespoke Effect block; no Season rows.

flavour_text: The scroll arrived sealed in gold thread. Its ink shifted between readings: maps into letters, warnings into opportunities, forgotten names into doors. I recorded it as possibility, not prophecy.
effect: When revealed, each player may discard any number of standard Encounter Cards from their own hand. For each card discarded this way, that player draws 1 random standard Encounter Card from the game box into their hand. Golden Boons cannot be drawn this way. If there are not enough standard Encounter Cards in the box, draw as many as possible. Then discard this card.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Golden Boons are distinct Encounter Cards. They do not use Season fields and may break normal rules only as specified by their Effect text. Specific note: Clarifies standard Encounter Cards and Golden Boon exclusion.
layout_note: Tarot portrait. Same back as Encounter deck. More ornate front within shared family. Use one bespoke Effect block; no Season rows.

flavour_text: The vial lay sealed in golden wax within the hollow roots of a dead pale tree. Its liquid caught the light like dawn held still. Those who carried it found storms softening, paths opening, and distance less certain of itself.
effect: When revealed, keep this card face-up near the Stewards Board. For the rest of the game, once per round during any player’s turn, that player may take the Travel to a Disconnected Tile action without spending an Action. All normal destination and placement rules still apply.
lifecycle_or_resolution: Golden Boons are distinct Encounter Cards. They do not use Season fields and may break normal rules only as specified by their Effect text. Specific note: Persistent reminder-card handling approved; keep face-up.
